FLOW.COMMENT: fwGetCurrentWorkflowStepActionParms - get the workflow's current step action and parameters

SEQUENCE.COMMENT: z_getActiveWorkflowStepInfo - get the workflow's name as well as its current step action and other info

MAP.COMMENT: SELECT TO_CHAR(WORKFLOW_STEPS) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS,CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: SELECT dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 1 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS1, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 4001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS2, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 8001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS3, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 12001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS4, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 16001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS5, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 20001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS6, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 24001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS7, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 28001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS8, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 32001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS9, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 36001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS10, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 40001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS11, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 44001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS12, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 48001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS13, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 52001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS14, dbms_lob.substr( WORKFLOW_STEPS, 4000, 56001 ) AS WORKFLOW_STEPS15, CURRENT_WORKFLOW_STEP FROM TFW_TRANS_ACTIVE WHERE TRANSACTION_ID='%sFwTransactionid%'

INVOKE.NAME: sRows != 1
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0000 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

Values.value: FE0000 No record found for sFwTransactionid='%sFwTransactionid%'

MAP.COMMENT: get workflowName, workflowType, senderAppIID, receiverAppIID, bulkProcessing
get sLoopStep - the current step within this loop

SEQUENCE.NAME: sSearchStep == sLoopStep
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if this step is the step we are looking for, then break out of the loop

MAP.COMMENT: get stepNum, stepService, stepType, errordefs, stepCluster, componentparms

INVOKE.NAME: $default
INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0504 Configuration error: Invalid step type %stepType% in workflow %workflowName%

Values.value: FE0504 Configuration error: Invalid step type %stepType% in workflow %workflowName%

BRANCH.COMMENT: if stepAction is blank, then fail

INVOKE.COMMENT: FE0503 Configuration error: Unable to find step %sSearchStep% in workflow %workflowName%

Values.value: FE0503 Configuration error: Unable to find step %sSearchStep% in workflow %workflowName%
